Uses of Class
com.rays.common.ORSResponse

  • Packages that use ORSResponse 
    Package Description
    com.rays.common  
    com.rays.ctl  

    • Uses of ORSResponse in com.rays.common

      Methods in com.rays.common that return ORSResponse 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      ORSResponse BaseCtl.deleteMany​(java.lang.String[] ids, java.lang.String pageNo, F form)
      Deletes multiple records by IDs.
      ORSResponse BaseCtl.get​(long id)
      Retrieves a record by ID.
      ORSResponse BaseCtl.save​(F form, org.springframework.validation.BindingResult bindingResult)
      Saves or updates a record.
      ORSResponse BaseCtl.search​(F form, int pageNo)
      Searches records with pagination.
      ORSResponse BaseCtl.validate​(org.springframework.validation.BindingResult bindingResult)
      Validates request data and collects field errors.
      Methods in com.rays.common that return types with arguments of type ORSResponse 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<ORSResponse> ApplicationExceptionHandlerCtl.handleDatabaseException​(java.lang.Exception e)  
      org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<ORSResponse> ApplicationExceptionHandlerCtl.handleRuntimeException​(java.lang.RuntimeException e)  

    • Uses of ORSResponse in com.rays.ctl

      Methods in com.rays.ctl that return ORSResponse 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      ORSResponse UserCtl.changePassword​(@Valid ChangePasswordForm form, org.springframework.validation.BindingResult bindingResult)
      Changes user password.
      ORSResponse LoginCtl.forgetPassword​(@Valid ForgetPasswordForm form, org.springframework.validation.BindingResult bindingResult)
      Handles forgot password functionality.
      ORSResponse RoleCtl.get​(java.lang.String name)
      Finds role by name.
      ORSResponse MarksheetCtl.getMeritList()
      Retrieves merit list of marksheets.
      ORSResponse LoginCtl.login​(@Valid LoginForm form, org.springframework.validation.BindingResult bindingResult)
      Authenticates user and generates JWT token.
      ORSResponse LoginCtl.logout​(javax.servlet.http.HttpSession session)
      Logs out user by invalidating session.
      ORSResponse UserCtl.myProfile​(@Valid MyProfileForm form, org.springframework.validation.BindingResult bindingResult)
      Updates user profile.
      ORSResponse FacultyCtl.preload()
      Loads dropdown data for Faculty form.
      ORSResponse MarksheetCtl.preload()
      Loads student list for dropdown.
      ORSResponse RoleCtl.preload()
      Loads role list for dropdown.
      ORSResponse StudentCtl.preload()
      Loads college list for dropdown.
      ORSResponse SubjectCtl.preload()
      Loads course list for dropdown.
      ORSResponse TimeTableCtl.preload()
      Loads course and subject list for dropdown.
      ORSResponse UserCtl.preload()
      Loads role list for dropdown.
      ORSResponse MarksheetCtl.rollNo​(java.lang.String rollNo)
      Finds marksheet by roll number.
      ORSResponse LoginCtl.signUp​(@Valid UserRegistrationForm form, org.springframework.validation.BindingResult bindingResult)
      Registers a new user.
      ORSResponse UserCtl.uploadPic​(java.lang.Long userId, org.springframework.web.multipart.MultipartFile file, javax.servlet.http.HttpServletRequest req)
      Uploads profile picture.
